tests.test_name: Story file upload populates story input
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a story file correctly populates the story input area, displays the filename, and keeps the Check Coverage button disabled until test cases are also provided.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I upload a story file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A story file can be uploaded to the Story Coverage page

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the story input is populated
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The story content appears in the input area after upload

test_coverage.verification_step: And the story filename is shown
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The uploaded file's name is displayed to the user

test_coverage.verification_step: And the Check Coverage button remains disabled until test cases are provided
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The action button stays inactive when only a story is provided and test cases are still missing

tests.test_name: Test case file upload populates test input
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a test case file correctly populates the test input area, displays the filename, and keeps the Check Coverage button disabled until a story is also provided.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I upload a test case file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A test case file can be uploaded to the Story Coverage page

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the test input is populated
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The test case content appears in the input area after upload

test_coverage.verification_step: And the test case filename is shown
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The uploaded file's name is displayed to the user

test_coverage.verification_step: And the Check Coverage button remains disabled until a story is provided
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The action button stays inactive when only test cases are provided and a story is still missing

tests.test_name: Pasting a story that exceeds the character limit shows an error
tests.description: Verifies that pasting story content exceeding the 50,000-character limit produces a clear error message indicating the content is too long.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I paste 50001 characters into the story input
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system enforces the maximum character limit when content is pasted

test_coverage.verification_step: Then I see a story paste error containing 'too long'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A meaningful error message is shown to the user when the character limit is exceeded

tests.test_name: Pasting a story at exactly the character limit is accepted
tests.description: Verifies that pasting story content at exactly the 50,000-character limit is accepted without errors and the input is populated.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I paste 50000 characters into the story input
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Content at the exact character boundary is not rejected

test_coverage.verification_step: Then no paste error is shown
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No error message appears when the content is within the allowed limit

test_coverage.verification_step: And the story input is populated
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The pasted content is successfully placed into the story input area

tests.test_name: Uploading an unsupported file type to the story input shows an inline error
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a file of an unsupported type to the story input displays an inline error and leaves the story input empty.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I upload an unsupported file to the story input
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system handles files with unsupported formats gracefully

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the story dropzone shows an unsupported file type error
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A clear error message is shown within the upload area informing the user the file type is not accepted

test_coverage.verification_step: And the story input is empty
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No content is loaded into the story input when an unsupported file is rejected

tests.test_name: Dropping multiple files onto the test case input shows a dismissible warning
tests.description: Verifies that dropping multiple files onto the test case upload area shows a warning, leaves the input empty, and allows the user to dismiss the warning.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I drop multiple files onto the story coverage test case input
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system detects and responds to a multi-file drop on the test case upload area

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the test case input shows a multi-file drop warning
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A warning message is displayed informing the user that only one file is accepted

test_coverage.verification_step: And the test input is empty
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No content is loaded into the test case input when multiple files are dropped

test_coverage.verification_step: When I dismiss the test case multi-file drop warning
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user can actively close the warning message

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the test case multi-file drop warning is dismissed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The warning disappears from the page after the user dismisses it
